resources.string: direct_player
Direct Player
Local lossless playback with separate Android USB capability and route evidence
Lossless source

Native FLAC/WavPack decoding, JamesDSP-enhanced playback, ordinary Android playback, and exact USB output are separate paths. Android mixer-contract, routed-device, and external evidence are always reported separately.
Choose local audio
Choose optional WavPack .wvc correction file
Correction file selected · choose a different .wvc
Embedded album artwork
Inspecting source and lossless metadata…
No source selected
Play
Pause
Ready
Opening decoder and selecting a safe playback path…
Playing ordinary Media3 route at unity player volume; direct USB and external fidelity are not claimed
Playing exact PCM with Android bit-perfect mixer contract active; routed-device confirmation pending
Playing exact PCM; AudioTrack routed-device matches the selected USB output; external verification pending
Exact USB PCM playback paused; Android mixer contract was active; routed-device confirmation pending
Exact USB PCM playback paused; AudioTrack routed-device was confirmed; external verification pending
Playback completed; selected USB route was confirmed by AudioTrack and preferred mixer attributes were cleared. External verification is still pending.
Playback completed and preferred mixer attributes were cleared, but AudioTrack did not expose routed-device confirmation.
Playback error: %1$s
Unable to inspect source: %1$s
%1$d Hz · %2$d channels · %3$s-bit · %4$s\n%5$s

%1$s
Source: %2$s · %3$s · %4$d Hz · %5$d significant bits · %6$d channels
Layout: %7$s
Decoded container: %8$d-bit integer PCM without ReplayGain
Tags: %9$s
ReplayGain metadata: %10$s
Decoded transformations: %11$s
High-resolution lossless source
Lossless source
Format is not verified as lossless
unknown
none
Playback mode
Automatic safe path
Bit-perfect direct (DSP disabled)
Enhanced with RootlessJamesDSP
Prefers an exact Android USB bit-perfect mixer contract, otherwise uses stereo JamesDSP, then honestly labeled ordinary Android playback.
Requires native decoded PCM plus an exact Android 14+ USB bit-perfect mixer contract. It never silently falls back and never applies DSP or ReplayGain.
Runs the native decoded stereo PCM through the actual preference-backed JamesDSP engine. This mode is processed and cannot be bit-perfect.
Decoded/output telemetry appears after playback starts.
USB output
Use Android bit-perfect USB mode for eligible PCM/WAV
Choose and inspect a source first.
USB capability has not been evaluated for this source.
Ordinary lossless playback is available. Compressed FLAC/ALAC is not eligible for exact USB mode until its decoded PCM format and direct output path are known.
Exact PCM source gate satisfied. USB eligibility is not known until a connected DAC advertises the same format with Android’s bit-perfect mixer behavior.
%1$s: %2$s. Playback has not started, so routed-device confirmation is pending. External DAC/loopback verification is also pending.
ROUTED_DEVICE_CONFIRMED: AudioTrack now reports the selected USB output as its routed device. This is Android routing evidence, not external bit-perfect verification.
Not enabled (%1$s): %2$s
Automatic mode selected JamesDSP because exact USB preparation was unavailable (%1$s). No bit-perfect claim applies.
Enhanced playback uses JamesDSP and the ordinary Android output path. USB exclusivity and bit-perfect output are not claimed.
Playing through the actual RootlessJamesDSP engine
RootlessJamesDSP playback paused
RootlessJamesDSP playback completed

Source: %1$d Hz · %2$d-bit · %3$d channels
Decoded: %4$s
AudioTrack request/report: %5$d Hz · encoding %6$d · %7$d channels
Active DSP stages: %8$s
Resampling: %9$s
Verification: unavailable (processed)

Decoder: %1$s
Decoded/output request: %2$d Hz · encoding %3$d · %4$d channels
USB DAC: %5$s · device id %6$d
Active DSP stages: %7$s
Resampling: %8$s
Verification tier: %9$s; external verification pending
Decoded and AudioTrack formats will be shown if Media3 exposes them. Output device, hardware bit depth, Android resampling, and mixing remain unknown.

Media3 selected: %1$s · %2$s Hz · %3$s channels
Output sample rate/bit depth/device: not exposed here
Active DSP stages: none
Resampling/mixing: unknown
Verification: unavailable
MQA status
No authorized MQA decoder is installed, and Android exposes no standardized trusted carrier flag. No unfold or rendering is claimed.
